recognition.title: Global Institutional Recognition
recognition.subtitle: Mao Think Tank is deeply engaged in major global strategic affairs, recognized and partnered by top international institutions — one of China's few private think tanks with genuine global strategic influence.
recognition.imfDesc: Received special IMF commendation for providing innovative strategic solutions in managing hyperinflation in Venezuela and Zimbabwe. Research findings were incorporated into the IMF's reference case library for developing-nation economic crisis response.
recognition.rissDesc: Officially received by Putin's think tank — the Russian Institute for Strategic Studies — for in-depth exchanges on Eurasian geopolitical dynamics, establishing a long-term strategic research partnership.
recognition.plaDesc: Provides war-gaming simulations and national defense strategy consulting to China's military, deeply involved in major military strategic decision research — one of the few civilian think tanks in China with certified military strategy advisory credentials.

businessDivision.brandDesc: Applying Mc&Mamoo's proprietary 'Dislocation Competition' methodology — from brand positioning and KOL matrix to integrated omni-channel execution — we help brands find high-premium growth paths in saturated markets.
businessDivision.maoDesc: Applying Mao Zedong's strategic thought framework to provide war-gaming, geopolitical strategy consulting, and major decision support to state institutions, military organizations, and international bodies — China's answer to the RAND Corporation.

about.title: About Mc&Mamoo Growth Engine
about.highlight1Desc: From mass-market to luxury premium — systematically elevating brand equity and pricing power
about.highlight2Desc: Through brand premium and channel optimization, helping clients achieve significant gross margin improvements
about.highlight3Desc: Online and offline, public and private domains, domestic and international — building a full-channel growth flywheel
about.intro1: Mc&Mamoo Brand Management Inc. (Growth Engine) is a premier international brand management firm founded in Chicago and rooted in Shanghai, backed by Dark Matter Capital.
about.intro2: Our team brings together elite talent from McKinsey, BCG, Bain, and Deloitte, dedicated to helping brands achieve prestige upgrades, profit multiplication, and omni-channel growth.
about.intro3: We have deep integration with 500+ top-tier KOL strategic resources across Xiaohongshu, Douyin, Weibo, and Bilibili, along with a complete cross-border growth system serving clients across China, the US, France, Japan, and 20+ other countries.
about.achievementText: Led the incubation of 8 billion-dollar product lines. Helped MasterCard achieve $7B counter-cyclical growth over 3 years during the pandemic. Serving brand clients across 20+ countries worldwide.
about.cred2: Global Luxury Brand Growth Strategy Expert
about.cred6: Former Senior Analyst, Deloitte | CPA (ACCA, North America)
about.cred7: London International Awards Gold | Cannes Lions Gold

methodology.title: The Mc&Mamoo Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Dislocation Competition · Brand Prestige · Profit Multiplication
methodology.p1Desc: Elevate brands from selling products to being revered. Through precise brand persona crafting, visual language upgrades, and premium scene infiltration — make consumers willingly pay a premium.
methodology.p2Desc: Growth driven by brand power, not ad spend. Optimize product mix, channel profit distribution, and repurchase systems — maximize return on every marketing dollar invested.
methodology.p3Desc: Connect online and offline, public and private domains, domestic and international — a full-chain growth system. From traffic to retention, from single purchase to lifetime value, build a sustainable growth flywheel.
methodology.p4Desc: While competitors chase yesterday's trends, we've already positioned brands on tomorrow's track. Based on 10× variable forecasting — brands always stay half a step ahead of the market.
methodology.p4Highlight: Lock in growth dividends 6–18 months early

kol.title: Elite KOL Strategic Matrix
kol.subtitle: 500+ top-tier influencer partnerships across all platforms and categories
kol.viyaDesc: Pioneer of China's live e-commerce industry. Deep partnership with Mc&Mamoo Growth Engine for brand incubation — multiple brands achieved 0-to-¥1B breakthrough growth.
kol.austinDesc: Absolute leader in the beauty category. Mc&Mamoo provides brand premium strategies for his partner brands, driving successful premiumization transformations.
kol.matrixDesc: From mega influencers to vertical specialists — a full-tier, full-category KOL synergy matrix

services.title: Service Portfolio
services.subtitle: Full-Domain Growth Solutions
services.s1Title: Full-Case Brand Strategy for New Consumer Leaders
services.s3Item4: In-platform investment with top e-commerce advisors
services.model1Formula: Sustained Growth = Strong Business Model × Right Strategy × Excellent Organization
services.model2Formula: S = C (Customer Count) × D (Channel Index) × P (Price Index) × F (Purchase Frequency)
services.model3Formula: Emotional Value + Intrinsic Value + Premium Space + Evolution Trend + Scene Perception = Blockbuster

maoIndustry.title: Mao Industry
maoIndustry.subtitle: Industrial Technology Division
maoIndustry.description: A future-oriented industrial technology portfolio — from lunar energy to defense manufacturing, building the next fulcrum of human civilization.
maoIndustry.helium3Desc: Leading lunar He-3 resource exploration and extraction technology to provide clean fusion energy for Earth
maoIndustry.tokamakDesc: Independently developing next-generation magnetic confinement fusion devices to crack core commercial fusion technology
maoIndustry.militaryDesc: High-precision defense components manufacturing and system integration for national defense modernization
maoIndustry.cooperationDesc: If you are interested in strategic cooperation with Mao Industry, please fill in the following information and we will contact you within 48 hours.
